meaning: adj.[医]有使血压增高的,收缩血管的,n.升高血压的物质
examples: Pressor response was induced by electrical stimulation of the hypothalamic defence area.
The result indicates the hydroscopicity of this resin is good and has good pressor absorbent power.
The results were as follows: Stimulating PVH induced significant pressor response and cardioacceleratory response.
